title: Next-day readiness forecasting code and reproducibility materials in elite women's football
description: Code, manuscript source, tables, figures, and reproducibility materials for a secondary analysis of the SoccerMon dataset. The project evaluates whether daily workload and wellness monitoring adds incremental value beyond a personalised autoregressive baseline for next-day readiness forecasting in elite women's football. The original SoccerMon data are not redistributed in this repository.
